headline: Palantir Technologies (PLTR) Shares Skyrocket, What You Need To Know
summary: Shares of data analytics company Palantir Technologies (NASDAQ:PLTR) jumped 5.2% in the afternoon session after yields fell as the Trump administration announced a new peace deal that would lead to the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz.

headline: Wolfe resumes Palantir coverage, cites valuation despite best-in-class AI fit
